text_block_list.text:
I have been Admire Groove's trainer for a while now, 
and while training is going well…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hah… haah… phoooh…
choice_data_list: Great, let's move on to the slope and ——

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: I know the regimen, you don't need to remind me every single time.

…Her harsh words and distancing have become 
commonplace to me as well now.

text_block_list.name: Older Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You two haven't made much progress, eh? 
Hahah, better you than me…

text_block_list.name: Similarly-Aged Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If I were in your shoes, I don't think I'd be able to take 
her constant cold treatment… Are you holding up okay?

Two of the other trainers I'm on friendly terms with strike up 
conversation sometimes, having looked upon many of these 
exchanges before with some degree of worry.

But while I appreciate their concern, it is unneeded. 
If anything, I gain more motivation whenever I see 
how earnestly she works on her running.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Hahh… haah…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……Hm. Hahh…!

The only thing is… I get the feeling that whenever they 
approach me like that, Admire Groove further distances 
herself from me.

I can't just push my colleagues away when they so kindly 
reach out to me in support. On the other hand, I can't have 
this affecting Admire Groove's mental state.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hahh… pheh… phew…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……Enjoying the view?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you can't keep your head in it, why don't you go home 
and take a nap. Today's program is all set already anyway, 
I can run trough it on my own.
choice_data_list: No, I'm sorry! I'm good. Ready anytime!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
……I'll continue with the next training item. 
You can do whatever you like.

…Let me just focus on what's right in front of me first. 
If I put in the work, our relationship will eventually improve 
and everyone else will begin to understand, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Were you the one who left me this drink? 
I told you you needn't bother.
choice_data_list: I just happened to be thirsty myself, is all!

text_block_list.text:
I decided to try playing acts like this off as completely normal, 
something trivial, in the hopes that she'll gradually learn to 
accept these tiny little bits of kindness.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's no need for you to come observe my solo training. 
…I'll be fine by myself.

Being pushed away is no problem. I'll simply acknowledge 
her with a smile. If I can get her to feel that it doesn't get 
me down, that's all I need.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I believe I asked you to leave tomorrow's training program 
out for me. I don't need a verbal explanation.
choice_data_list: Understood, just ask if you have questions!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …What has come over you? You've been acting so frivolously the past few days. Are you ridiculing me or something?
choice_data_list: Huh? No, I don't mean to ——

text_block_list.text:
…Uh-oh. Are my efforts backfiring? Perhaps I tried too hard. 
In a panic, I try to assure her I'm definitely not ridiculing her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
If not that, then I struggle to understand 
why you look so strangely happy…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Or is this some attempt at bonding? 
As if that vapid smile would help anything.
choice_data_list: …I'm only doing this because I want to!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……I am not in need of whatever you are doing.

To make matters worse, my attempts at responding to her 
with a smile had gone down awkwardly with my colleagues…

text_block_list.name: Older Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, uh, are you… into that kinda harsh treatment? 
That your type? N-Not that it's my business, s'long as 
you're enjoying it…

text_block_list.name: Similarly-Aged Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yeah! Whatever makes you happy! 
Don't worry, we won't judge.
That was not the kind of understanding I was looking for…
